site.title: Trisha Halder - Content & SEO Writer Portfolio

hero.name: Hi! I am Trisha
hero.subtitle: Content Writer based in Bangalore
hero.description: I help write compelling content with proper keywords so they can rank on Google pages. As a dedicated and versatile content writer with a strong background in English Literature, I bring a rich understanding of language and storytelling to every project. My experience spans academic content, SEO content, and blog writing, allowing me to create compelling and optimized materials that engage diverse audiences.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: With a strong foundation in English Literature, I specialize in creating content that not only engages readers but also performs exceptionally well in search rankings. My approach combines creative storytelling with strategic SEO implementation.
Currently, I'm looking forward to expanding my expertise in copywriting and content marketing, continuously learning and creating value through every project I undertake.

portfolio.heading: My Portfolio
portfolio.subheading: A showcase of my content creation across various formats and industries

projects.title: UNICEF Campaign
projects.description: Impactful copywriting for a humanitarian cause, focusing on emotional connection and call-to-action.

detail.intro: Impactful copywriting for a humanitarian cause, focusing on emotional connection and call-to-action.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This is a copywriting project provided by TTT Academy where I had to showcase my skill of writing for a non-profit organization.

The Problem

Write ‘an ad’ that helps raise money for the children of Gaza.

It could be a carousel, a video, a GIF, or anything else you can think of. The one thing it needs to do is convince your followers on Instagram, or connections on LinkedIn to donate.

The Method

  • Researched UNICEF to understand their tone and style.
  • Researched the current situation of Gaza children and what UNICEF is doing for them
  • Created a video ad on Canva using a similar tone and style to UNICEF
  • Also added subtitles for better understanding and convenience.

projects.title: Food & Beverage Copy
projects.description: Appetizing and engaging copy for food products, designed to drive sales and brand affinity.

detail.intro: Appetizing and engaging copy for food products, designed to drive sales and brand affinity.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This is a copywriting project provided by TTT Academy where I had to showcase my skill of creating an engaging copy.

The Problem

Recreating a Krispy Kreme copy to make it interesting.

The Method

  • Researched Krispy Kreme to understand their tone and style.
  • Started with a controversial statement to grab attention.
  • Created a long-form copy to mimic the style of the company.

projects.title: Video Content Strategy
projects.description: SEO-optimized video titles, descriptions, and tags to maximize YouTube reach and engagement.

detail.intro: SEO-optimized video titles, descriptions, and tags to maximize YouTube reach and engagement.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

As a part of the video assignment in TTT Academy (A Content Writing course I was enrolled to), I have created this video optimization strategy deck for this YouTube video.

The problem

  • Write a title and create a thumbnail for this video using these 3 elements: subject, graphic, and text.
  • Detail the optimization strategy you’ll use to promote the video.

The Method Used

  • Thoroughly researched about YouTube video optimization
  • Applied VidIQ for Title and Caption Optimization
  • Used proper keywords to enhance reach
  • Listed effective promotional strategies to attract the attention of the viewers.
  • Created the deck on Canva to make it presentable and attractive

projects.title: Video Content Creation
projects.description: Complete video content project including scripting, optimization, and engagement strategies.

detail.intro: Complete video content project including scripting, optimization, and engagement strategies.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

Another video assignment I have successfully completed in TTT Academy.

The problem

To create a 5-7 minute YouTube video following the tone and appearance of Headspace videos.

Method

  • Binge watched Headspace videos to capture their style and tone
  • Used Clipchamp to create the video
  • Wrote a script for the video
  • Used AI to create a voiceover
  • Used proper keywords and hashtags
  • Used Canva to create a relevant thumbnail for the vidoe

projects.title: Email Campaign Content
projects.description: Conversion-focused email marketing campaigns including abandoned cart recovery strategies.

detail.intro: Conversion-focused email marketing campaigns including abandoned cart recovery strategies.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This was a Digital Marketing assignment at TTT Academy which I have successfully completed.

The problem

Create a 3-step email marketing sequence for an abandoned cart for TTT Academy. Identify the stages of the funnel you’re writing the email sequences for.

Method

  • Researched the content of TTT Academy to understand its tone and style
  • Researched abandoned cart email content and timing
  • Selected the proper stages of the funnel
  • Used Canva to create a deck

projects.title: Instagram Content Strategy
projects.description: Engaging social media content and marketing strategies for Instagram Reels and posts.

detail.intro: Engaging social media content and marketing strategies for Instagram Reels and posts.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

Another assignment I have completed for a Digital Marketing masterclass at TTT Academy. Here I was able to show my expertise in creating promotional video content. I have created an Instagram reel advertisement to promote the service of Audible.

The Problem

For one stage of the funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion, and retargeting), create paid ads for Audible on one platform of your choice

Method

  • Researched Audible and the brand’s Instagram Marketing strategies to understand the style and tone.
  • Prepared a script for the advertisement.
  • Used Canva to create the reel
  • Added royalty free music to match the vibe of the advertisement.

projects.title: Topical Marketing Content
projects.description: Strategic marketing campaign content leveraging current trends and topical relevance.

detail.intro: Strategic marketing campaign content leveraging current trends and topical relevance.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This was an assignment at TTT Academy that enabled me to showcase my expertise on Topical Marketing Campaigns.

The Problem

Identify a trend from Twitter and ideate a social media topical campaign for Airbnb using two or more of the following: tastemakers, unexpectedness and communities of participation.

Method

  • Researched on trending topics on Twitter (X)
  • Identified an appropriate trend that can be merged with the business strategy of Airbnb.
  • Researched about the tone and and style of Airbnb campaigns
  • Used Canva to created a deck proposing the campaign

projects.title: Content Strategy Presentation
projects.description: Comprehensive content strategy and marketing plan with detailed implementation roadmap.

detail.intro: Comprehensive content strategy and marketing plan with detailed implementation roadmap.
detail.bodyHtml:
About the project

This assignment at TTT Academy allowed me to showcase my understanding of the content strategy of popular brands. I have chosen Starbucks for this project to highlight their changing strategies for the Indian market.

The Problem

Find 1 brand that has changed strategy to adapt to their new market and research what steps they took to reflect their changed positioning. Make it into a 10-slide deck.

Method

  • Thoroughly researched on Starbucks- it’s history and initial strategies
  • Researched about the entry of Starbucks in the Indian market.
  • Focused on key challenges the brand has faced
  • Understood the reason behind their changed strategies
  • Used Canva to create a deck with relevant images and design to make it attention grabbing.
